subject: fix(pwa): capture beforeinstallprompt before React mounts
body:
The beforeinstallprompt event can fire before the React app mounts and
the usePWAInstall hook registers its listener, causing the "Install as
App" button to never appear. This is a race condition most visible on
fast connections (e.g. Android Chrome) where the browser evaluates the
manifest and fires the event before the deferred module script executes.

Added an inline script in index.html that captures the event on
window.__pwaInstallPrompt synchronously. The usePWAInstall hook now
checks for this early-captured event on mount and consumes it.

Tags: pwa, install, race-condition, android
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch

title: capture beforeinstallprompt before React mounts
